keywords.job: I am the abbot of the white raven monastery on the isle of the kings.
keywords.name: My name is Costello.
keywords.tibia: That is the name of our world and its major continent.
keywords.god: They created Tibia and all life on it.
keywords.life: On Tibia there are many forms of life. Plants, the citizens, and monsters.
keywords.plant: Just walk around, you will see grass, trees, and bushes.
keywords.white: The legends tell us of a white raven which lead the ship of the first monk of our order here. He discovered this isle and the caves beneath it.
keywords.raven: The legends tell us of a white raven which lead the ship of the first monk of our order here. He discovered this isle and the caves beneath it.
keywords.caves: Anselm, the first of our order, discovered them while looking for a suitable burial place for his king.
keywords.anselm: He was a humble and pious man, and he was chosen by the royal family of thais to find a resting place for their dead.
keywords.isle: We founded our monastery to guard the royal tombs and to gather wisdom and knowledge.
keywords.order: We founded our monastery to guard the royal tombs and to gather wisdom and knowledge.
keywords.wisdom: You are allowed to enter the library upstairs. Stay there and don't go upstairs, because that area is reserved for members of our order.
keywords.knowledge: You are allowed to enter the library upstairs. Stay there and don't go upstairs, because that area is reserved for members of our order.
keywords.tibianus: One day every Tibianus ends up here.
keywords.king: The bygone leaders of the Thaian empire rest beneath this monastery in tombs and crypts.
keywords.tomb: The tombs and crypts of the Thaian lineage are well protected deep beneath our abbey, although ... but surely this will not interest you.
keywords.crypts: The tombs and crypts of the Thaian lineage are well protected deep beneath our abbey, although ... but surely this will not interest you.
keywords.although: In my dreams the dead are talking to me about torment and disturbance. But I might be imagining things.
keywords.interest: In my dreams the dead are talking to me about torment and disturbance. But I might be imagining things.
keywords.imagining: Brother Fugio, the only one of our order who is allowed to enter the crypts, assures me everything is all right.
keywords.torment: Brother Fugio, the only one of our order who is allowed to enter the crypts, assures me everything is all right.
keywords.disturbance: Brother Fugio, the only one of our order who is allowed to enter the crypts, assures me everything is all right.
keywords.fugio: To be honest, I fear the omen in my dreams may be true. Perhaps Fugio is unable to see the danger down there. Perhaps ... you are willing to investigate this matter?
keywords.alright: To be honest, I fear the omen in my dreams may be true. Perhaps Fugio is unable to see the danger down there. Perhaps ... you are willing to investigate this matter?
keywords.diary: Thank you again for handing me that diary.
keywords.passage: You should not be here at all and I won't allow anyone to transport you from or to this isle.
keywords.ferumbras: Don't mention this servant of evil here.
keywords.excalibug: Sadly we have only little knowledge on this topic.
keywords.news: Sorry, we rarely hear anything new here.
keywords.monster: There are really too many of them in Tibia. But who are we to question the wisdom of the gods?

texts: WHAT? You have to be that trespasser my brothers told me about! Entering the restricted area is a horrible crime!
Welcome, ! Feel free to tell me what has brought you here.
I am the abbot of the white raven monastery on the isle of the kings.

greetingPatterns.response: WHAT? You have to be that trespasser my brothers told me about! Entering the restricted area is a horrible crime!
Welcome, %N! Feel free to tell me what has brought you here.

entries.response: Thank you very much! From now on you may open the warded doors to the catacombs
Please forgive an old man, I shouldn't have asked a stranger anyways.

By the gods! This is brother Fugio's handwriting and what I read is horrible indeed! You have done our order a great favour by giving this diary to me! Take this blessed Ankh. May it protect you in even your darkest hours.
Begone! You do not have enough money!
So receive your absolution! And never do such a thing again!
